parameters.query:
SELECT
  s.source_id,
  s.source,
  s.title,
  s.sponsor,
  s.drug_name,
  s.key_drug,
  s.key_indication,
  s.impact_level,
  s.impact_score,
  s.signal_type,
  s.competitor_flag,
  s.ai_summary,
  s.recommended_action,
  s.url,
  s.version,
  s.first_seen_at,
  s.last_seen_at,
  -- Is this a new signal or update?
  CASE WHEN s.version = 1 THEN 'NEW' ELSE 'UPDATE' END AS signal_status,
  -- Days since first seen
  EXTRACT(DAY FROM (NOW() - s.first_seen_at))::int AS age_days
FROM signals s
WHERE s.last_seen_at >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')
ORDER BY
  CASE s.impact_level
    WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1
    WHEN 'MED'  THEN 2
    WHEN 'LOW'  THEN 3
    ELSE 4
  END,
  s.impact_score DESC,
  s.last_seen_at DESC;

SELECT
  DATE(last_seen_at) AS signal_date,
  impact_level,
  COUNT(*) AS count,
  AVG(impact_score)::numeric(5,2) AS avg_score,
  SUM(CASE WHEN competitor_flag THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS competitor_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN version = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_signals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN version > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS updated_signals
FROM signals
WHERE last_seen_at >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')
GROUP BY DATE(last_seen_at), impact_level
ORDER BY signal_date DESC, impact_level;

SELECT
  drug_name,
  key_drug,
  sponsor,
  key_indication,
  COUNT(*) AS signal_count,
  MAX(impact_score) AS peak_score,
  MIN(first_seen_at)::date AS first_seen,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT signal_type, ', ') AS signal_types,
  STRING_AGG(DISTINCT source, ', ') AS sources
FROM signals
WHERE competitor_flag = TRUE
  AND last_seen_at >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days')
GROUP BY drug_name, key_drug, sponsor, key_indication
ORDER BY peak_score DESC, signal_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT
  COALESCE(key_indication, 'Unknown') AS indication,
  COUNT(*) AS total_signals,
  SUM(CASE WHEN impact_level = 'HIGH' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN impact_level = 'MED'  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS med_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN competitor_flag THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS competitor_signals,
  AVG(impact_score)::numeric(5,2) AS avg_score,
  MAX(impact_score) AS max_score
FROM signals
WHERE last_seen_at >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours')
GROUP BY key_indication
ORDER BY high_count DESC, total_signals DESC
LIMIT 12;

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO workflow_metrics (
  total_signals,
  high_count,
  med_count,
  low_count,
  competitor_count,
  avg_impact_score
)
VALUES (
  {{ $('Compute Analytics').first().json.total24h }},
  {{ $('Compute Analytics').first().json.highCount }},
  {{ $('Compute Analytics').first().json.medCount }},
  {{ $('Compute Analytics').first().json.lowCount }},
  {{ $('Compute Analytics').first().json.competitorCount }},
  {{ $('Compute Analytics').first().json.avgScore }}
);
